name: button
description: Pressable button with multiple variants (primary, secondary, tertiary, outline, ghost, destructive), sizes, loading state, and icon slots.

props.name: children
props.description: Button content — supports text, icons, or any composition

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant of the button

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset controlling padding and minimum height

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a loading spinner and disables user interaction

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the button and applies disabled styling

props.name: leftIcon
props.description: Icon rendered before the button label

props.name: rightIcon
props.description: Icon rendered after the button label

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the outer Pressable container

props.name: accessibilityLabel
props.description: Accessibility label; defaults to string children when omitted

props.name: accessibilityHint
props.description: Accessibility hint describing the result of pressing the button
